title: Topa Na Gam Ka It Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa na gam it ing, Gamlapi aa na inn;
Thupha a piaksa A pawlpi, Ama si tawh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na Pawlpi ka it hi, Na ding, a kulhpi mai;
Hawm thawhna le itna mit tawh, En

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pawlpi ka it manin, luangsak luankhi tui bang;
cingin, A nasem ning, leitung bei ni mateng.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka lungdam theihzah-in, vantung ka tun
Amah tawh ne khawm nuam sa-in, Hong itna ka phat ding.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Zion mual ah na sang ding;
Leitung minthannate bei-in, nuamzaw vantung thupha.
